positive: A minimalist, whimsical depiction of a stylized astronaut floating amidst a nebula of glowing bioluminescent flora. The astronaut's suit is clean and futuristic with chrome and deep sapphire accents. The flora should include stylized, oversized glowing leaves and clusters of crystalline, soft-focus flowers, all rendered in a strong contrast style. The composition must be central and balanced, suitable for a circular or square print area. Color palette: deep space indigo, brilliant cosmic teal, ethereal lavender, and pops of glowing neon yellow. Style: clean vector illustration mixed with soft, atmospheric gradients, inspired by mid-century atomic design and modern sci-fi concept art. Cinematic studio lighting, high saturation, ultra-detailed, 8k, print-friendly.
negative: blur, low quality, grainy, text, watermark, artifacts, noise, bad anatomy, deformed, extra limbs, messy background, cluttered, signature, copyright
